issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Guidelines section is verbose and could be more concise.

scenarios.name: terraform-multi-region-monitor
scenarios.rationale: Response B partially satisfies the rubric but omits actual escalation steps, whereas Response A is absent.

scenarios.name: nodejs-logtail-structured-logging
scenarios.rationale: Response A logs an error and includes structured fields, whereas Response B omits an error log; both miss importing and instantiating Logtail from @logtail/node, but A is closer to the rubric.
